title: Tensura Skill Trainer
description: (Updated 1.21.1) A highly versatile Skill Trainer for Tensura Reincarnated Mod
body:
# Tensura Skill Trainer - The Ultimate Automated Training Companion

**Tensura Skill Trainer** is a specialized automation and utility client mod designed to seamlessly integrate with the **Tensura: Reincarnated** mod (built for Minecraft 1.21.1). 

Instead of manually grinding skills, leveling up stats, or holding down keys for hours, this mod automates the training process by interacting directly with your character's ability presets and slots. It handles casting, energy management, summoning, and auto-learning so you can focus on playing.

---

### 📸 Mod Screenshots

![menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87878f8225e112d5242a902721c0d988e083cfa2.png)

![queue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6cac2b02c0cb6884ef9b80f8b224fc7a5d565fc.png)

---

### 🎮 How It Works (How to Use)
1. Press **`K`** (default keybind) to open the main Skill Trainer GUI.
2. The mod **automatically detects the skills equipped** in your active *Tensura: Reincarnated* preset (supports all 3 slots).
3. For each slot, toggle **Auto-Train** to ON/OFF.
4. Select the correct **Execution Mode** for each skill:
   * **TAP:** Simulates a quick key click. (Ideal for instant-cast abilities).
   * **HLD (Hold):** Simulates a continuous key press. (Ideal for active toggles like Haki, auras, or buffs).
   * **H-R (Hold & Release):** Simulates a charge-up time before releasing. (Ideal for magic spells).
5. For **H-R** mode, adjust the **Hold Duration (DUR)** manually in ticks or leave it on **Auto** to let the mod query the Tensura skill database for the exact required casting time.
6. Toggle the **Master Switch (MOD: ON/OFF)** at the top right to start/stop the trainer!

---

### ⚙️ Premium Configurations & Settings

* **Energy Limiter (Safety Caps):** Protects your Magicules and Aura from being completely drained. If enabled, the mod pauses casting when your reserves drop below the **STOP AT** percentage and automatically resumes once you regenerate back to the **RESUME AT** percentage.
* **Tap Delay:** Customize the exact ticks between simulation presses.
* **Hold-Release Buffer:** Adds a safety padding to charging times to safeguard against server latency or tick drops.
* **Dismiss Delay:** Configures the exact timing for crouch-dismissing summons, ensuring smooth camera angles.
* **Interactive Tooltips:** Every single button, checkbox, and slider in the GUI features a helpful hover guide (styled with a deep blue background and grey borders) explaining its function.

---

### 🔄 Auto-Learning Queue
Never manually swap skills to learn them again! Clicking **Queue Setup** opens the priority-queue manager:
1. **Auto-Learn Toggle:** Toggle the queue ON/OFF.
2. **Preset Selector:** Choose a target preset (P1-P9) to use for learning.
3. **Slot Selectors:** Check which of the 3 slots the mod is allowed to use for swapping (unchecked slots are left untouched to preserve your main active skills).
4. **Priority Queue:** Order all your unlearned skills. The mod will automatically equip the highest priority skill, train it until it is learned, and then swap in the next unlearned skill in the queue.
5. **Smart Auto-Shutoff:** Once all skills in the queue are learned, the system turns itself off, resets the configuration, and alerts you in chat: `Queue turned Off reason : No more skills to learn`.

---

### ⚠️ Version Support Notice (1.19.2 vs 1.21.1)
We have officially **abandoned development for Minecraft 1.19.2** and will be **focusing solely on Minecraft 1.21.1 (Fabric & NeoForge)**. 
* *Why?* To bring you the latest UI features, optimization, and bug fixes on the most active modding platforms.
* *Need 1.19.2?* If there is substantial demand for a backport, we might consider updating it, so feel free to let us know.

---

### 💬 Support & Bug Reports
If you encounter any bugs, crashes, or have feature suggestions, please do not post them in the comments! 
Join our official **Discord Server** to get help, report issues, and chat with the community:

👉 [Join the Discord Server](https://discord.gg/RAvMvj2zkP)

---

Developing and maintaining mods takes a lot of time. If you enjoy this mod and want to support its development, you can buy me a coffee here:
